stemHtml: How may pilots retrieve an RNAV / RNP1 / RNP2 SID or STAR for use?

options.a: Selecting the approach from the company's route database.
options.b: Selecting the approach number associated with the approach.
options.c: Defined by the waypoints and conforms to the charted route.
options.d: Retrievable by SID/STAR name from the on-board navigation database and conforms to the charted route.
